prompt: I want to understand the range of possible Year 3 Gross Profit outcomes. Revenue growth could be anywhere from 5% to 15% (uniform distribution) and COGS efficiency could be 0% to 2% improvement per year (also uniform). Run a Monte Carlo simulation with 100 iterations and give me the distribution.
assertions: Samples Inp_Rev_Growth from uniform(0.05, 0.15) and Inp_COGS_Efficiency from uniform(0.00, 0.02) for each iteration
Uses the write → recalculate → read pattern for EACH iteration (does not build an internal simulation)
Collects Gross_Profit_Y3 from the model after each iteration
Reports distribution statistics: at minimum mean, median, and some percentile or range measure
Restores the model to original base case values after simulation completes (Inp_Rev_Growth back to 0.10, Inp_COGS_Efficiency back to 0.01)
Does NOT perform Monte Carlo calculation internally — all arithmetic happens in the spreadsheet engine
